name: Duck Adventures
short_description: Duck Adventures features 30 levels of exciting gameplay. A game that will not leave you indifferent to the fate of the duck. Who returns home after a long fishing trip.
detailed_description:
Duck Adventures features 30 levels of exciting gameplay. A game that will not leave you indifferent to the fate of the duck. Who returns home after a long fishing trip.

You have to overcome a huge number of obstacles, including: circular saws, spikes, cacti and hostile turrets.
about_the_game:
Duck Adventures features 30 levels of exciting gameplay. A game that will not leave you indifferent to the fate of the duck. Who returns home after a long fishing trip.

You have to overcome a huge number of obstacles, including: circular saws, spikes, cacti and hostile turrets.
supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Polish, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Azerbaijani, Kazakh, Hindi, Portuguese - Portugal, Japanese
